title: Wintery Wings
description: Embrace divinity with the God Wings!
body:
![preview pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/348a9dc8df9a49f7412407d2b78dac35c64dff78_0.webp)
### What does this mod add?
This mod adds one new item: **The God Wings**.

It's a chestplate that combines the functionality of an Elytra with armor.

**Toggle State:** Open and close your wings on command with a dedicated keybind (default: `>`).


### How to get the wings?

The God Wings are a **guaranteed (100%) drop** from the **Ender Dragon**.

Defeat the final boss of the game to claim your prize and take to the skies in style!

---

### Dependencies

To use this mod, you need to install:
*   [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
*   [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
